assumptions: Mock India site selection uses seeded cluster scoring rather than full geospatial analysis.
context: Financing basis for Ethylene Glycol in India.

criteria.name: India fit
criteria.justification: Economic basis must fit India public data constraints.

criteria.name: Cost competitiveness
criteria.justification: Basis must remain competitive under public-data assumptions.

criteria.name: Execution realism
criteria.justification: Procurement and finance assumptions should be buildable.

criteria.name: Scenario stability
criteria.justification: Weak options should be surfaced for approval.

selected_summary: 70:30 debt-equity basis selected after lender-coverage reranking (min DSCR 0.050, LLCR 0.000, PLCR 0.000). Higher-leverage options were downgraded because of covenant pressure. The selected basis still carries covenant pressure and requires approval.
hard_constraint_results: Financing options were reranked against minimum DSCR 1.10, average DSCR 1.25, LLCR 1.30, and PLCR 1.45.
Downside financing ranking used scenario 'conservative' to test covenant resilience beyond the base case.
